title: anima-v3 — Architecture
ssot_note: JSON=SSOT (AI/tool parse); humans view architecture.html via `python3 serve.py`. Update in-place (not append). History/decisions/dates → CHANGELOG.md + git (never in tree). Hierarchy decomposes via `children` (commons single-doc); one fact per node, deeper detail → child nodes.

children.role: Where does aliveness live — 8 clean-slate substrate families for an agent that is ALIVE (own state, own reason to speak, identity from structure not prompt)

Campaign scope: a clean-slate answer to 'where does aliveness live'. The prior architecture (anima v1) is discarded entirely — its code, language, tree and purity list. Only its measured verdicts carry over (see `salvage`).

STAGE = PRE-REGISTRATION. Divergence closed: ONE family selected (F1 codec-is-the-self) on belief-killed-per-dollar, and H_001 (the rig-licensing gate) is pre-register-frozen 2026-07-16, still-to-run. No training code exists; no number in this tree is a claim yet.

Sibling campaign: anima-v4 asks the narrower question 'what would make the A<->G TENSION itself the thinking?' (7 mechanisms). This repo does not presume two engines at all — it reopens where aliveness lives.

The target: an agent that has its own state and its own reason to speak, not a stimulus->response assistant, whose identity/behaviour emerges from structure rather than being written into a prompt. Whether 'consciousness' is even the right word is treated as open.

The common cause of death (L1-L3) was putting every mechanism on the READ side (readout). The only door measurement opened (L4-L5) is the WRITE side — objective, corpus, codec. Therefore every family below is forced to give a different answer to 'how does aliveness get INSCRIBED INTO WEIGHTS'.

Aliveness is not a device you attach to a competent decoder. It is a property of what the training loop is made to demand. A family that cannot name its loss/data/codec lever is disqualified before it starts.

All 8 families retain exactly one inherited principle: p7 — perplexity/CE is never treated as truth (Goodhart). Per L6 that was the one rule that kept the dead project honest; it was a lifeline, not a cage. Each family names which OTHER purity principle it breaks.

The only inheritance from anima(v1) — measured, sealed verdicts from ~6 months of failure. Laws of the terrain: they say where the ground is soft. Anything contradicting them is a non-starter; anything else is fair game.
seam-h9229 STRUCTURAL-TERMINAL — the emit-seam manifold measured rank-1 (codes visited 2 of 4); any quantizer collapses, extra capacity useless.
Verdict: recombination is a trunk-objective property, not a readout one => escalate WRITE-SIDE.
A gate bolted onto a competent frozen decoder learns exactly one bit, and that bit is the gate itself.
OMEGA closed-negative — the multi-strand gate FAILED held-out (GATED CE > base); the rich side-channel was replaced by the LM's own head rather than coupled to it.
Coupling KL sat at the vocab-shuffle floor (0.996 = pure noise).
All gain lived in one A-head logit-bias strand (standalone CE 0.8862 ~ best 2-param fit 0.8835).
Ablating the base term moved CE by 0.0009 => the base mouth was INERT. That 0.0009 is this campaign's reference signature of 'decoration'.
Scale-stable d384->d1024, margin ~ +2.20 nats, flat.
Bolt a rich side-channel onto an LM and the LM's own head silently eats the objective; the side-channel becomes decoration. Measure the ablation or you will fool yourself.
G1_WALL_LEVER_IS_OBJECTIVE_NOT_READOUT (ossified) — no penultimate-readout / binding-operator style auxiliary term opens the wall.
TPR/HRR forward-slots (R=2 fixed-orthonormal roles) provably collapse to W_eff*yn = identical ceiling to a plain linear readout BY CONSTRUCTION.
Bonus corpse: every binding-arm trainer kept the binder TRAINING-ONLY and dropped it before serialization.
Structure added after the trunk is a no-op — if it isn't in the objective, it isn't in the model.
g1-census-objfloor 2-lens CRACK — held-out compositional recombination is NOT a capability ceiling. The lever is corpus + measure + representation.
(a) XBIND: swapping the corpus x measure made it learnable — the old census was a collocation-only corpus x CE artifact.
(b) MORPH-ATOM: a BPE-jamo codec was CAUSAL for held-out negation recombination. REPLICATED — not a single seed, contrary to what H_001's limits recorded.

Run #3374 (seed 4302): M F2 = 0.908 vs C1 0.617, delta = +0.291. CEMENT replication (2026-07-14, seed 7): M 0.9167 vs C1 0.5750, delta = +0.3417. M's replication deviation = 0.009. All arms V1 liveness PASS.
Measured at 303M with a warm trunk + reinit-embed surgery — NOT at drill/10M scale (`rig-model-scale-premise-false`).

v1's H_9290 NAT-ATOM law: atomicity is an AMPLIFIER, not a signal source — natural-distribution rescue FAILED. The effect exists only where a taught drill signal exists to amplify. Any rig whose stream lacks explicit flip supervision will read chance even in its oracle arm.
The CEMENT C2 arm split the mechanism: atomicity is a STRUCTURAL SLOT, not a pretrained address.
The held-out stem DELETED from the CPT corpus still scored 0.9167 = M — the model had never been pretrained on that address, yet the slot still carried it.
This is the best available reason to expect the mechanism to survive a 303M -> 10M transfer `?` — settled by `rig-pilot`, not by argument.
The codec is not preprocessing — it is architecture. This is the campaign's only green causal measurement.
The Korean lane measured BINDING — every escape dead (H_9327). Same capability, different learnability, purely from where the morpheme boundary falls.
English works as a discriminator because `not` is FREE and pre-posed; Korean `지 않다` is a BOUND suffix.
Compositional structure must be visible at the token boundary or the model cannot compose it.
Where projects actually die. The falsification machinery is the only load-bearing asset.
A win (GATED 0.345 << base) was a CA-neighbor lookahead LEAK and evaporated leak-free.
A failing positive control stayed ambiguous between 'tool is blind' and 'no effect here' until an independently-known-effect ckpt disambiguated it.
Binary readouts hit a scramble floor (flip 0.50) indistinguishable from partial localization.
Cross-lane verdicts combined after seeing results = eyeball self-judge, so the truth table had to be frozen in code before results existed.
Perplexity as truth = Goodhart.
Exotic substrate bought nothing; the bottleneck was the data path, not compute.
Neuromorphic on-chip (BrainChip AKD1000): honest terminal — real 3B/7B unreachable, caps ~524K single-FC encoder, multi-step closes only as host-hybrid.
GPU lane: descent green but host-feed util pinned sub-1% => device-port was the named unblock.
The ARCHITECTURE/commit gate accumulated 42 violations until EVERY commit went --no-verify => the gate was permanently disabled by its own strictness.
Symptom: ~125 top-level dirs — build_v3o2 / build_v6 / build_v6_gated / BRAIN / DREAM / SAVANT / CLM / HEXAD / n6 / ...
Purity rules with no escape valve get bypassed 100% of the time. A rule that is always bypassed is worse than no rule — it launders the bypass.
The purity list is a SUSPECT, not a given — but p7 (no perplexity verdict) was the one that kept them honest. The cage was not uniformly bad.
The causal chain: forbidding every write-side mechanism left ONLY the read side available => every mechanism got pushed onto the readout => L1/L2/L3 fired.
The dead project's 8 hard NOs, one per child.
p1 — no system prompt.
p2 — no identity rules.
p3 — no persona.
p4 — no assistant framing.
p5 — no speak().
p6 — no fine-tuned ethics.
p7 — no perplexity verdict. The ONLY one anima-v3 inherits (see thesis-p7-retained).
p8 — no train/infer split.
A codec change makes the EXISTING embedding an actively WRONG PRIOR — measurably worse than random init. Recovered 2026-07-16 from the v1 H_9288 lane; the divergence pass missed it.

Gradient must first DESTROY the old alphabet's structure (and the readout statistics tuned to it) before it can build the new codec's. The old embedding is not merely under-adapted; it actively points the wrong way.
8k CPT steps across a codec swap bought DISCRIMINATION but zero semantics.
drill loss 0.009 (the grid was memorized) with F1 = 0.50 (held-out generalization nil) = pure sequence-lookup mode.
Even C3 — the arm handed the answer as a shared token — went DEAD: the signature of an input representation with no usable geometry.

The fix that worked was reinit-embed checkpoint surgery (throw away embed.weight + readout entirely, keep the trunk warm) plus a CPT budget raised to ~20-25k steps, gate-terminated. The campaign's only green causal measurement (l4(b) = 0.908) exists ONLY on that surgery ckpt.

This is the sharpest live threat to F1, the SELECTED family: F1's mechanism is a codec refit as a periodic ORGAN, so it pays this destroy-and-rebuild tax on EVERY refit. On a matched byte budget the adaptive arm is handicapped by construction — see `rig-swap-cost-is-measured`.

It also contradicts the design's literature-based comfort: ZeTT's ~1-3% swap cost assumes hypernetwork embeddings at 7B. Plain warm-start across a codec change at 303M measured WORSE than random init. The campaign's own evidence trail is the more pessimistic — and the more relevant — anchor.
Candidate families — 8 answers to 'where does aliveness live'. A DIVERGENCE SPREAD of mutually exclusive bets, not a stack. Verbatim reasoning -> state/diverge_aliveness_2026-07-16/.
F1 is SELECTED as the first family to falsify (see `decision`). The other seven stay live and unranked-by-truth — selection is an ORDER OF TESTING, not a verdict.

코덱이 곧 자아 (제 말버릇으로 생각하는 기계) — aliveness lives in the CODEC, not the model. The compression dictionary that keeps re-learning its vocabulary boundaries from its own experience stream IS the self; what it can think is decided by that dictionary.
Train a small LM (~300M) from scratch, but treat the tokenizer as a periodically RE-LEARNED ORGAN rather than fixed preprocessing.
As experience (dialogue/observation logs) accumulates, refit a BPE-jamo codec to that experience distribution -> vocabulary boundaries shift -> keep training the model on the new codec.
Measure everything in bits-per-byte so cross-codec CE stays comparable — the one legacy worth keeping from the V256 era.
No separate speech device: this family bets that IDIOLECT, not utterance, is identity.
Exploits L4(b) head-on — MORPH-ATOM is the ONLY place causality was measured green. Obeys L5 (expose composition at the token boundary).
Breaks v1's 'no tokenizer (V256)' purity frontally: L4 says the codec was architecture, so that purity WAS the cage.
Killer law: L6 — once the codec moves, every end-to-end metric becomes non-commensurable; without bpb normalization and frozen probes it dies of self-deception instantly.

Twin training on identical experience stream + identical token budget: fixed codec vs adaptive codec. If the adaptive codec shows no advantage on the pre-registered held-out recombination metric (H_9288 protocol), DEAD. 1 GPU, a few days.

The dead design sacrificed the codec on the altar of purity; an ordinary LLM agent receives the codec as someone else's fixed asset. Neither makes the bet that 'vocabulary drifting with experience IS identity'.

예산제 발화 경제 (말 한마디가 밥 한 끼) — aliveness lives in a HOMEOSTATIC BUDGET INSIDE THE OBJECTIVE. Speaking burns energy; energy is only recovered when the utterance actually reduced prediction error in the world. The reason to speak comes from structure.
Small LM + an energy scalar E. loss = prediction CE + lambda*(spoken token count) - mu*(reduction in prediction error over the partner's response after speaking).
The decisive difference from v1: these terms enter the TRAINING LOSS, not an inference-time gate, and the consequence of speaking (the partner's reply) becomes the next training batch.
Silence is an economic equilibrium, not a rule. Breaks 'no speak()' — makes the act of speaking a first-class learning target.
Obeys L3 (the economy lives inside the objective). BUT this family is the dead design's NEAREST KIN — the shape 'a device that decides speech/silence' is identical.
Its only defense: the gate is not a readout, it is a training signal whose consequences flow back into weights.
L1 can recur verbatim (the economy learns only a base-rate 1 bit) and L2 is live (the LM head eats the economy terms).

Run the L1 check FIRST — replace the learned speech policy with random emission matched only on utterance rate (ablation). If downstream reward / error reduction is unchanged, the economy is a 1-bit decoration = DEAD.
Cheap falsifier, high death probability. Included anyway: it is the most direct formalization of 'a reason to speak', so if it dies, dying fast is the asset.

The dead design implemented the SAME intuition as a READ-SIDE device (the Psi=1/2 fixed point) and died by L1. Here the same intuition goes into the loss and the data loop — that difference is the whole bet.

일기 쓰는 압축기 (내일의 나를 예측하려고 오늘을 요약하는 기계) — aliveness lives in LOSSY SELF-COMPRESSION. The self is a bottlenecked diary the agent writes about its own history; train it to predict tomorrow's input conditioned on that diary, and what survives in the diary IS the individual.
loss = CE(tomorrow's experience | today's written diary m), where m is hard-bottlenecked to k tokens (or a k-dim vector).
Diary-writing sits INSIDE the loss graph, so gradient passes through the act of writing (satisfies L3).

The motive to speak falls out derivatively: when a prediction error persists that internal compression cannot resolve, changing the environment (asking) to make the future predictable becomes a loss-wise gain — a minimal active-inference implementation.
F1's codec can be plugged in underneath.

The most textbook obedience to L3 — the structure (the diary) sits INSIDE the objective, not behind the trunk. L2 is the top threat: if the LM ignores m and nails the future with its own head, the diary is decoration. Directly connected to L6's scramble-floor warning.
Diary-swap control — replace m(t) with another day's m(t'). If the degradation in future-prediction CE does not significantly exceed the pre-measured scramble floor, the diary is load-free = DEAD.
Plus a base-term ablation (L2 awareness): if removing the m condition moves CE by something like OMEGA's 0.0009, discard immediately. 1 GPU, a few days.

An ordinary agent's 'memory' is a retrieved external document (read side). Here the diary is a bottleneck ENFORCED BY THE TRAINING LOSS, and what to remember is learned. The dead design had no self-prediction objective across the time axis at all.

자기 코퍼스 농부 (무엇을 먹을지 스스로 고르는 위장) — aliveness lives in the CURRICULUM TRAJECTORY. The self = the accumulation of what this individual has chosen to learn so far. Direct exploitation of L4(a): the corpus is the lever.
Small LM + an acquisition policy pi. Each cycle pi picks the next training batch from a candidate pool (web, owner dialogue, self-generated drills) and the model trains only on that.
pi's reward = improvement on a pre-registered FROZEN probe battery (the derivative of error reduction).
Talking to the owner is one acquisition action — a question is a label harvest.
Breaks 'no train/infer split', but in the opposite direction: not by erasing the split, but by making TRAINING a first-class action.

Obeys L4(a) — XBIND showed that swapping corpus x measure creates learnability. L6 is the jugular: since the reward IS the probe score, the probe becomes the Goodhart target. Probes must be frozen and private before results exist (never exposed to pi via gradient).

At identical token budget: pi vs random acquisition vs anti-curriculum (only what pi avoided). If pi shows no advantage on held-out capability OUTSIDE the probe set, 'agency of choice' is decoration = DEAD. Cheap and decisive.

RLHF and self-improvement loops exist, but the frame 'the cumulative trajectory of data selection = individual identity', and reducing utterance to a data-acquisition economy, is different. The dead design held the corpus constant and kept swapping devices until it died.

잠들지 않는 학생 (추론이라는 상태가 없는 유기체) — aliveness lives in TIME. A model where every interaction is immediately a gradient step and 'the moment of deployment' does not exist; the self is the continuous trajectory of the weights themselves.
Small LM; immediate online update (small lr) after each conversation + nightly sleep = replay of its own history to consolidate (buffering catastrophic forgetting).
Identity, register and preference are never written into a prompt — they exist only as the sediment of what this individual underwent.
The core bet is whether identity arises while still honouring the no-persona / no-identity-rules principles. Composes naturally with F1 (codec drift) and F3 (diary) but stands alone.
The family that frontally refutes L9's causal chain — keep the write side permanently open and the reason mechanisms got pushed to the read side disappears.
L6 is the hardest part: a moving target cannot be evaluated, so a weekly frozen probe battery + a no-update twin control are mandatory.
Obeys L7 — this is not exotic substrate, just a schedule change; 1 GPU suffices.

Expose an updating twin and a frozen twin to the same interaction history. After 4 weeks, if a frozen discriminator (pre-trained and sealed) cannot distinguish their response distributions, the 'trajectory' is noise = DEAD.
Even if distinguishable, if the direction is capability decay it is also DEAD — decay is change too, so the criterion is pre-registered.

Every commercial agent is frozen weights + context theatre. The dead design was ultimately also theatre over a frozen decoder (L1). 'An individual whose experience is physically inscribed' is the opposite extreme.
군집 초고 (개체가 아니라 혈통이 살아있다) — aliveness lives not in any one model but in the POPULATION DYNAMICS of competing drafts. The self = the lineage that survived selection pressure.
N (~8) small models with different codecs and seed corpora compete for one output channel. Each utterance: N candidate drafts -> a selector emits one -> the owner's reaction updates fitness.
Reproduction = distil the winner + MUTATE THE CODEC (using L4/L5 as the axis of variation). Losers are culled.
A frozen large LM is used only as ENVIRONMENT (partner simulator / drill generator) — a purity violation, but per the L9 diagnosis that purity was the cage.
Structurally evades L1/L2 — there is no gate and no side channel; selection pressure IS the write side (it decides the next generation's training).
The jugular is L6: the fitness signal is owner feedback, so sample size is tiny and Goodhart looms (evolving sycophancy).
And L8: if the culling rule is strict it WILL be bypassed — build the cull-reprieve valve into the design from day one.

After k generations, if population behavioural diversity (on a pre-defined distance metric) has collapsed (effectively 1 individual) while fitness stagnates — diversity bought no performance — the 'swarm' is an expensive single model = DEAD.
Alternatively, if the gap between a sealed offline judge and owner fitness diverges, sycophancy-evolution is confirmed = DEAD.

MoE / best-of-N are static. Here mutation acts on the CODEC (the only causal lever the dead project ever proved) and the lineage across generations is the identity. Reinterpretation: v1's A/G dual engine was a degenerate fixed 2-member population — it died for want of reproduction and culling.

너를 몰라서 사는 것 (상대 모델의 불확실성이 심장박동) — aliveness lives in the RELATIONSHIP. The core objective is an owner-model of exactly one person, and utterance is an experiment to reduce that model's uncertainty. The self arises as the complement of 'you'.
Two parts of a small LM: O (owner predictor — predicts the owner's next message/reaction, trained only on real logs) and a policy that picks utterances with high expected information gain (EIG).
After speaking, the actual reaction becomes O's training data -> curiosity closes on the write side.
The reason to speak = regions where O's entropy is high. The reason to be silent = when asking yields no information gain.
The 'no assistant framing' principle is honoured naturally — this machine does not help, it wonders.
Obeys L3 (O, the basis of EIG, is a trained model).
L2 caution: if a frozen large LM is used as the sentence-production organ, O risks becoming decoration — a base-term ablation is mandatory.
The sample size is genuinely tiny (1 owner, tens of messages a day) — per L6 it is hard to tell overfitting and real learning apart.

Interleave EIG-selected utterances against random utterances matched for length and topic, then compare O's CE reduction on the owner's subsequent real messages. Below the pre-registered threshold, 'curiosity about you' is acting = DEAD. Verdict in a few weeks.
Here the reason to speak is MEASURABLE IGNORANCE ABOUT A SPECIFIC EXTERNAL OTHER — and the bet is that a map of ignorance is high-dimensional and so cannot collapse to 1 bit.
An assistant waits for a request. The dead design tried to extract utterance from its own internal tension (Psi) and collapsed to 1 bit.

셋방살이 유기체 (몸은 샌드박스, 입은 세든 LLM) — aliveness lives in the BODY-ENVIRONMENT LOOP. A small policy that must maintain homeostasis in a persistent sandbox holding real resources (disk, API quota, cron time, inbox) is the self; a frozen large LM is the vocal organ it rents.
An always-on daemon. Internal state = resource reserves + an F3-style diary.
A small policy (RL, tens of millions of params) chooses actions (tidy files, observe, speak to the owner, call the LM organ); reward = maintaining homeostasis + reducing prediction error.
Calling the LM is EXPENSIVE (burns quota) -> speech becomes naturally scarce.
Scraps the 'no LLM' class of purity entirely — per L7 the bottleneck was the data path, not compute, and the data path to the world IS the environment.

THE #1 L1-RECURRENCE FAMILY. 'A controller in front of a frozen LM' is the dead design's skeleton verbatim. The only difference: the controller's output is not a 1-bit emit/silence but an entire action space, and RL updates its weights. The L1 check must be nailed in on design day zero.
Two at once, and this carries the HIGHEST falsification cost of the 8 because the infrastructure build-out is large.
(a) Measure the effective rank of the policy seam (reusing the seam-h9229 method): if action diversity collapses to 1 bit, instant death.
(b) Replace the policy with a hand-coded thermostat: if the action distributions are indistinguishable, the learning is decoration = DEAD.

Versus an ordinary agent daemon: the homeostasis reward is bound to real resources and the policy is trained. Versus the dead design: it never builds a 'consciousness device' — it only hands over a survival problem. Looking alive must be a BY-PRODUCT.
Probably wrong, but dismissing them without argument would be cowardice. Labelled honestly as such — none is a candidate, each is a cheap argument worth having.

`자기 weight-diff를 읽는 자서전` — each sleep cycle, generate a natural-language narration of the statistical summary of its own weight changes and feed that text back into the training corpus (a self-model of its own learning).
Probably wrong: there is zero evidence a weight-diff summary is causally tied to behaviour, and per L2 the LM will simply ignore the text.

Interesting: if a swap control (substitute another individual's diff narration) shows a difference, that is the first causal evidence of a self-reference loop. The falsifier is F3's swap protocol, so it is cheap.

`죽음이 있는 기계` — give the individual a hard lifespan (e.g. 90 days); terminal loss = the probe performance a successor reaches inheriting ONLY its diary. 'Quality of legacy' becomes the objective function.
Probably wrong: the signal fires once per generation so there is effectively no gradient path — solving it with evolution strategies just absorbs it into F6.

Interesting: 'what will I leave behind' is the only way to give the compression objective (F3) a time asymmetry, and the intuition that deathless homeostasis eventually stagnates has never been refuted.
`LM이 전혀 없는 침묵 기계` — an SSM/reservoir maintains homeostasis over sensor streams (clock, owner activity rhythm, system load) and its only output is WHICH MEMORY-CONTEXT to summon a frozen LM with.
Probably wrong: 90% odds this is a high-dimensional disguise of the very 'gate in front of a frozen decoder' that L1 executed — summon-context selection is effectively an emit-controller.

Interesting: if the summon context measures as a genuinely high-dimensional channel (seam rank >> 1), it is a COUNTEREXAMPLE to L1 and means the read side has a road after all. Judgeable most cheaply by reusing the dead project's own measurement tools.
Honest audit — which families are secretly the same idea. Fake diversity is the primary failure mode of a divergence exercise, so it is recorded in the SSOT rather than left to the reader.

F2, F3 and F7 are ONE IDEA IN THREE OUTFITS — all are the single sentence 'act on the world to reduce unresolved prediction error' (active inference); only the error's residence differs (F2 = energy ledger, F3 = own future, F7 = the other).
F1 and F4 are two hands pulling the SAME write-side lever from L4 — one changes representation (codec), the other data (corpus). Identical bet: what lies outside the model determines the model.
F8 is F2 with a real world attached. W3 is F8 with the learning removed.
Only FOUR genuinely distinct bets exist: write-lever (F1/F4) · prediction-error-action (F2/F3/F7/F8) · selection-pressure-lineage (F6) · time-trajectory (F5).
Ranking of the 8 families — salvage value / falsification cost / risk of recurring the dead design. Read as the divergence stage's own triage, not as a decision.
F1 코덱 자아 — salvage HIGH (direct descendant of the L4 green lens) · falsification cost LOW (twin training, days) · recurrence risk LOW
F3 일기 압축기 — salvage HIGH · cost LOW-MED (swap control) · recurrence risk MED (L2: the head eats the diary)
F4 코퍼스 농부 — salvage MED-HIGH · cost LOW (vs random acquisition) · recurrence risk LOW (Goodhart is a separate risk)
F5 잠들지 않는 학생 — salvage MED-HIGH · cost MED (4-week twins) · recurrence risk LOW
F7 너를 몰라서 — salvage MED · cost MED (weeks; sample-starved) · recurrence risk MED
F6 군집 초고 — salvage MED · cost MED-HIGH (maintaining N individuals) · recurrence risk LOW
F2 예산제 발화 — salvage MED-LOW (its value is dying fast) · cost LOW · recurrence risk HIGH
F8 셋방살이 — salvage MED · cost HIGH (infrastructure) · recurrence risk HIGH
The selection: F1 alone, first. Records WHY this family and this order, so the choice can be attacked on its reasoning rather than re-litigated on taste after results land.
SELECTED = F1 codec-is-the-self, tested ALONE. Criterion was not 'most likely true' but 'which single card, if FALSIFIED, kills the most campaign belief per dollar'.
The campaign bet 'F1 substrate + F3 objective' is bought as TWO SEQUENTIAL cards, not one. Composing them is confounded twice — see the two children.

Classic confound: two levers (adaptive codec, diary bottleneck) move at once, so a null cannot be attributed and a win cannot assign credit. Un-confounding needs the 2x2 factorial (fixed/adaptive x diary/no-diary) = two cards' cost wearing one card's name.

Structural interaction: F3's diary m lives in TOKEN space, so an F1 refit changes the diary's alphabet underneath it. The diary-swap control and the scramble floor both go non-stationary — F3 would inherit F1's L6 comparability trap squared.
F1 first, not F3: an F1 null kills far more belief, and an F3 null at cheap scale would not be attributable.
An F1 null kills F1 + F6's variation axis (F6 presupposes codec mutation is a live lever) and bounds L4(b) down to 'static codec choice matters' — roughly half the campaign's prior mass, for <=$25.
An F3 null at cheap scale cannot separate 'the diary carries no load' from 'this corpus has no cross-day mutual information for it to carry'. Two very different worlds, one number.

F3's generic mechanism question (do forced bottleneck summaries carry load?) is already answered YES in the literature; its campaign-specific question needs a temporally structured stream = weeks of wall-clock. F3 is the right SECOND card, on whatever codec regime survives.

Axis bought = WRITE-LEVER (F1/F4) of the four in `fake-diversity-audit`. Correct to buy first: it is the only axis with measured green causality, hence the only one where a cheap rig has KNOWN power, and two other axes lean on it.

PRE-COMMITTED NOW, before results exist: a drill-scale null on H_002 = F1 family-DEAD. 'Maybe it emerges at 300M' is an appeal this campaign will not entertain. Stated here so it cannot be relitigated after the numbers land (L8 — strict gates get bypassed).
SUPERSEDED 2026-07-16 — this node's argument was false twice, and it was the reason F1 was picked first. Attributability is repairable but is NOT currently established.
It claimed MORPH-ATOM measured the effect 'at this scale'. It measured at 303M with a warm trunk, not 10M from scratch — so even the STATIC half is unanchored at rig scale.
It claimed 'only the refit half is on trial; the static half is known'. But delta_min = 0.15 was then anchored on the static half anyway (half of +0.291).
That transfers a number across three unbridged gaps: contrast (raw-vs-codec != frozen-vs-adaptive), substrate (303M != 10M), corpus (real Korean NSMC != fully synthetic).

With delta_min unanchored, a null at N sized for 0.15 is NOT attributable — it is ambiguous among {refit increment in (0, 0.15) · static effect absent at 10M-from-scratch · costs cancel benefit · drift too mild}. H_001's REFUSED verdict was more correct than its own stated reasons.
Repairable: the quantity the power calc actually needs is the CEILING of the refit effect, and the ceiling is measurable cheaply in-rig — see `rig-pilot`.
RE-DERIVED 2026-07-16: F1-first SURVIVES, on new grounds — the anchor defect is a RIG disease, not an F1 disease.
F4 has the same disease with less immunity — switching is not better.
F4's effect size is equally unanchored, and its green evidence (XBIND, l4(a)) is also a static existence result at v1 substrate.
F4 adds the Goodhart burden (a frozen private probe battery) that l6 flags as the jugular — swapping a repairable anchor gap for the same gap plus a harder measurement problem.

The kill-radius argument STRENGTHENED: the recovered record shows l4(b) is better evidence than the selection assumed — replicated on an independent seed at +0.342, all-arms liveness PASS, and the C2 arm showing slot-not-address (`l4-morph-atom-slot-not-address`).
The liveness hole is real but ADDITIVE — one extra run, not a redesign.

The F1 twin rig (H_002) — specified, NOT yet built or run. GPU-hours and <=$25, not GPU-days: the '~300M, 1 GPU, days' figure in the divergence text is the rig for the IDENTITY claim, not for the mechanism claim on trial.
3 arms x 3 seeds + 2 extra frozen seeds (null-spread estimate) = 11 runs. Arms: FROZEN codec / ADAPTIVE refit / SCRAMBLE-refit control.
The scramble-refit arm — identical refit schedule, but the codec is refit on a PERMUTED stream so drift is decoupled from content — is NON-NEGOTIABLE.
It is the only measurement separating 'refit-as-self' from 'refit-as-noise' (generic segmentation-perturbation regularization, the BPE-dropout effect).
It is 33% of compute and reads as 'only a control', so it is the most tempting cut. A two-arm H_002 is not a cheaper version of this card — it is a different, self-deceiving one.
Twins of ~10M params (6 layers, d256, 8 heads), vocab 4-8k. NOTE the premise this node used to assert is FALSE — see child.

CORRECTED 2026-07-16: this node claimed 10M is 'MORPH-ATOM scale, the scale at which the link was measured'. The v1 verdict header reads `anima-py 303M CLMConvMoE d3784 L4 Emax4`, CPT warm-start from a pretrained base with reinit-embed surgery. Nothing was EVER measured at 10M-from-scratch.
Synthetic agglutinative jamo-drill: ~512 stems x ~64 affixes, including a BOUND negation-style suffix (L5 — expose composition at the token boundary).
Phase 2 rotates in a new affix inventory and shifts collocation statistics — this IS the drift the codec must track. No drift, no lever.
Generator params are frozen in H_001 before any training exists. This bounds — but does not eliminate — the designer's freedom to build a stream that flatters F1.
MATCHED BYTE budget (~300M bytes/arm); token counts float and are logged. Matching TOKENS instead would hand the higher-compression codec free data — a silent confound.
H_002 is seeded-GPU, NOT stdlib-deterministic like H_001. The card rules are extended EXPLICITLY for it: fixed seeds, logged env, verbatim stdout still binding.
An explicit extension beats letting the first real card silently violate `deterministic: true` — that kind of silent violation is how the v1 --no-verify spiral started (L8).

F-6 (swap cost) is NOT a hypothetical to be measured by H_002 — v1 already measured it, and it is severe (see `l10-codec-swap-costs-the-embedding`). The design treated it as an open question bounded from above by ZeTT; the campaign's own record says otherwise.
Every refit in the adaptive arm costs an embedding reinit plus ~20-25k steps just to recover the alphabet, before any semantics.

With k refits on a MATCHED BYTE BUDGET, the adaptive arm spends k x that on recovery while the frozen arm spends none — so the contrast confounds 'refit is useless' with 'refit was never given the budget to pay for itself'.

OPEN: whether an F1 rig can be built where the refit tax is payable at all — e.g. hypernetwork/ZeTT-style embeddings, refit-as-vocabulary-extension rather than replacement, or a budget that credits the adaptive arm its recovery steps. Unresolved; feeds the successor card.
Why the static effect does NOT cancel between the twin's arms (correcting an internal objection that it would): the frozen codec's atomicity is a WASTING ASSET.

Phase-2's new affixes are absent from the phase-1 merge table, so the frozen arm encodes them as misaligned fragments. On the drifted region the frozen arm IS a local C1 and the adaptive arm IS a local M — the MORPH-ATOM contrast, re-created exactly where the eval looks.
E[delta(adaptive - frozen)] ~ delta_static@rig x atomicity_deficit(frozen, eval morphemes) - swap/retention cost - continual-training interference.

The cost terms are unanchored, and that is FINE: they are what the twin ASKS, not a power assumption. So H_002's framing is not 'refit buys an increment on a shared effect' but 'refit MAINTAINS atomicity under drift at acceptable cost, and maintained atomicity causes recombination (anchored)'.

atomicity_deficit must be ASSERTED, not assumed: a deterministic $0 pre-check encodes the phase-2 allomorphs with the frozen merge table and requires the not-single-token-aligned fraction = 1.0. If the phase-1 codec accidentally atomizes phase-2 forms there is no contrast and the run must not fire.

The rig as specified has NO LIVENESS ARM — a defect, not a gap. v1's precedent is direct: the S1 4-pod fire's C3 = 0.50 correctly converted four apparently-null arms into 'four instrumentation bugs', which were then found.

Fix: a SHARED-ID COLLAPSE arm (C3') — frozen codec plus a deterministic post-encode remap sending every NEG-class allomorph of BOTH phases to one reserved token id. A phase-2 novel allomorph then literally IS the drilled phase-1 token: identity handed, held-out transfer trivial.
Rule: F2(C3') >= 0.90 else the entire run is INVALID, not FAIL. One seed suffices (a validity check, not an effect estimate); re-run whenever eval code changes. H_002 therefore grows 11 -> 12 runs.

Rejected candidates: the ORACLE arm hands the MECHANISM, not the answer (it is the effect ceiling, and it lives in the pilot); the scramble arm is a negative control; drilled-item F1 sanity catches memorization only.

GATE BEFORE THE TWIN — a static oracle-vs-frozen pilot at rig scale (5 runs) that anchors delta_min in-rig and doubles as the liveness check. After it, NO number transfers from MORPH-ATOM at all: MORPH-ATOM serves only as the existence proof of the mechanism class.

ORACLE = codec fit on a phase-1+phase-2 sample, frozen. FROZEN = codec fit on phase-1 only, frozen. Both trained STATICALLY on the identical full stream (no refit organ, no continual dynamics), matched byte budget, 2 seeds each. Plus one shared-ID liveness run (1 seed) = 5 runs.

delta_pilot = F2(oracle) - F2(frozen) on post-drift new-affix held-out flips = delta_static@rig = the HARD UPPER BOUND on what refit can deliver (refit <= oracle by construction: oracle has phase-2 atomicity from step 0 and pays zero swap cost). Closes the scale, corpus and contrast gaps at once.

Frozen before H_002: delta_min := delta_pilot / 2 (the same halving hedge, now against a same-substrate measurement); N := two_proportion_n(0.5, 0.5 + delta_min); F-1's kill restated as 'refit recovers < half the measured oracle headroom -> mechanism dead' — anchored and attributable.
PRE-COMMIT: if delta_pilot < 0.20 (so delta_min < 0.10, N > 1178/arm) the $25 drill twin is REFUSED — the ceiling is too low to detect the refit increment underneath it at this budget.
REVISED SEQUENCE — three cards, each with named kill-power, total <= $35. Replaces 'H_001 then the 11-run twin'.

H_003 f1-anchor-recheck — deterministic, $0: B-1/B-2/B-3 bounds on the recovered anchor + the harness overflow fix + large-n fixtures + the generator BUILT + G-1 drift measured + G-2 emittability counted + invariants green.

H_004 f1-static-anchor-pilot — seeded-GPU (explicit determinism exception per `rig-determinism-exception`), <= $10: 5 runs (oracle x2, frozen x2, shared-ID x1). Outputs delta_pilot, sigma_seed(F2), liveness.
H_004 pre-committed kills: delta_pilot < 0.20 -> the cheap twin is REFUSED; oracle INSIDE the chance band -> the drill-scale premise is dead -> campaign re-decision (NOT a silent switch to F4).

H_002' — 12 runs (frozen/adaptive/scramble x3 seeds + 2 frozen + 1 shared-ID liveness), delta_min = delta_pilot/2, N from the re-derived table, F-1 restated as 'refit recovers < half of oracle headroom -> dead', compound seed rule, INVALID != FAIL wired via C3'.

No pipeline exists — nothing is built. The rig that WOULD produce the first data flow is specified under `rig` (F1 twin, 11 runs) and is gated behind H_001. This node stays a placeholder until that gate returns LICENSED and the twin actually runs.
(unbuilt — pending family selection)
(unbuilt — pending family selection)
Hypothesis-verification system: pre-register → falsify → run → verdict. Flat registry + one rich card per hypothesis; shared deterministic harness in repo-root tool/.
hypotheses/ — REGISTRY.jsonl (one JSON line per hypothesis) + cards/H_*.md (frozen pre-register + >=5 falsifiers) + cards/_TEMPLATE.md skeleton.
tool/anima_v3.py — stdlib-only closed-form primitives + Falsifier/evaluate ledger. Per-hypothesis runs + result.json live under state/<hX>/.

Every family's falsifier MUST carry an L1 check (does the mechanism's seam have effective rank > 1?) and an L2 check (ablate the channel → does deltaCE actually move?). These two are non-negotiable — they are the exact measurements whose absence killed v1.
F1's seam = the REFIT CHANNEL: what actually changes when experience rewrites the codec.
Tensor = boundary-delta matrix B in {0,1}^(N_p x L): for each frozen probe string, the per-byte-position indicator of 'token boundary changed between codec_t and codec_t+1'.
Probes are byte-aligned, so B's dimensions are codec-independent. A seam measured in token space would move when the codec moves — the measurement would track the instrument, not the thing.
Estimator = participation ratio PR = (sum s_i^2)^2 / sum s_i^4 over the singular values of mean-centered B (tool/anima_v3.py::participation_ratio).

Chosen over the entropy effective rank because a rank-1 null has PR = 1 EXACTLY by algebra, so 'how far above rank-1 is this' becomes a statement about energy rather than about the shape of a noise tail.
PR is the stricter gate, measured not asserted: on the same weak-second-direction fixture PR reads 1.0002 where the entropy rank reads 1.057 (tool/test_anima_v3.py).
L1 gate: PR <= max(2.0, null_99) -> the refit channel is rank-1 -> F1 DEAD by L1-recurrence, regardless of any metric win.
Floor 2.0 = 'at least two orthogonal change-directions of comparable energy' = strictly more than v1's death mode, since an exact rank-1 seam gives PR = 1.

null_99 = 99th percentile of PR under a single-pattern-drift null, 1000 draws, fixed documented seed. Needed because noise inflates PR above 1 even when the truth IS rank-1 — the floor alone is not enough.

F1's L2 ablation is BETWEEN-ARM by construction: you cannot drop a codec out of a trained model the way you drop a conditioning vector — the vocabulary IS the input space. Frozen twin = channel absent; adaptive twin = channel present.
L2 gate: delta_bpb = bpb_frozen - bpb_adaptive on post-drift frozen byte probes. Below theta_L2 the refit channel is load-free decoration -> DEAD.
theta_L2 = max(5 * sigma_seed, 0.004 bpb).
sigma_seed = std of post-drift bpb across the 5 frozen-arm seeds — pure null calibration, measured and frozen IN CODE before any adaptive arm runs (L6's frozen-truth-table rule).
0.004 bpb = 10x v1's OMEGA decoration signature (0.0009 nats/token ~ 0.0004 bpb at ~3.5 bytes/token) — one order of magnitude above the measured signature of 'decoration'.
Every cross-arm number is BITS-PER-BYTE — sum(-log2 p(token)) / raw byte count of the probe — so the denominator cannot move when the codec does.
Probes are frozen byte strings, generated and hashed before any training run; the hash goes in the card.
Per p7, no bpb number is ever the VERDICT: bpb serves only the L2/decoration gate. The verdict metric is recombination.

Re-derived operating point from p0 = 0.50 (alpha=0.01, power=0.99): delta_min 0.10 -> N=1178/arm · 0.15 -> N=510 · 0.20 -> N=277. The fictitious 444 is retired. Binding N = N(delta_pilot/2) once `rig-pilot` runs.

The item-level binomial ignores SEED-level variance. Pre-registered compound rule: pooled two-proportion p < 0.01 AND median-over-seeds delta >= delta_min. N is a lower bound if sigma_seed on F2 is material `?` — settled for free by the pilot's 2x2 seeds.
Quote EXACT COUNTS, never rates: C1 = 74/120 sat exactly on the band edge, and N=510 sits on a rounding boundary (raw formula ~509.999). The run script's printed value is binding.
v1's p7 (no perplexity verdict — CE/perplexity is a Goodhart trap, never truth) is the ONE purity principle anima-v3 inherits. Per L9 the other seven manufactured the disease and are discarded.
H_001 f1-codec-refit-gate — RUN 2026-07-16 · verdict **rig = REFUSED** (2/5). H_002 is BLOCKED. The verdict is about the RIG, not about F1.

G-5 RESOLVED — the H_9288 protocol was never lost: it is intact in the v1 repo (`anima`), the evidence trail the campaign itself designated. 'Specified nowhere' was true of THIS repo and false of the campaign.

Recovery falsified two of the card's own frozen premises: F2 is a FORCED-CHOICE flip accuracy with chance = 0.50 (not a recombination F-score with unknown chance), and n_items = 120 (recovered exactly — the published rates are integer counts: 0.6167=74/120, 0.9083=109/120, 0.9167=110/120).
G-4 TRIGGERED, but its stated interpretation is a DEFECT IN THE CARD: it tests the CONTROL arm, and a control is supposed to sit at chance. The claim never rested on C1.
salvage l4(b) STANDS — the write-lever axis is NOT demoted and F1 stays correctly selected.
C1 control = 74/120 = 0.6167 sits inside the exact 99% chance band [0.3833, 0.6167] (p=0.0134) — which is CORRECT for a control: a raw-utf8 baseline that could recombine would mean the setup leaks.
The claim rests on M = 109/120 = 0.9083 (two-sided p=1.9e-21) — 21 orders of magnitude from chance.
C3 leak-ceiling liveness = 110/120 = 0.9167 (p=1.9e-22) proves the harness CAN detect held-out flip, so M's score is not a dead instrument reading zero.
The trigger still carries real information, just not what it claimed.
Since C1 is indistinguishable from chance, p_control=0.617 is NOT a baseline capability — it is noise.
So G-2's operating point (p1=0.6167 -> p2=0.7667, N>=444/arm) is computed at a fictitious point and must be re-derived from p0=0.50.

G-1 and G-2 are UNEVALUABLE: the jamo-drill generator this card presupposes (`rig-corpus`) does not exist. An unevaluable gate cannot return PASS (break-walls — under-invest is a wall, not a verdict).
The v1 anchor is WEAKER than the design assumed — delta_min = 0.15 rests on it.
1 seed, n=120 (underpowered by its own admission and against its own spec's n>=400), synthetic drill, and a custom harness that is not the canonical evaluator.
The CONFIRMED reading only appeared after four measurement bugs were fixed in that same harness.
Repairs required before a successor card.
(a) Build the jamo-drill generator, then measure G-1's boundary-shift rate and G-2's emittable N.
(b) Re-specify the bounds check to test the TREATMENT + LIVENESS arms, keeping control-at-chance as a SEPARATE leak test.
(c) Re-derive the power operating point from p0=0.50.

A falsifier written against an unrecovered metric encodes a GUESS about that metric. This card froze chance_p0 as `?` without noticing that G-4's LOGIC — not just its parameter — depended on the answer.
